# Clickora Landing Page - Project Instructions

## Overview
Modern landing page for Clickora web development services built with Astro and TailwindCSS 4.1.

## Stack
- **Framework**: Astro (latest version)
- **Styling**: TailwindCSS 4.1 (critical: uses new CSS-first approach)
- **TypeScript**: Enabled for type safety

## Key Features
- Hero section with strong CTA
- Services showcase (E-commerce, Landing Pages, SaaS)
- Pricing section (from 300€)
- Maintenance plans (from 49€/month)
- WhatsApp integration
- Contact form
- Modern animations and transitions
- SEO optimized
- Conversion-focused copy
